tool_args.label: New York City Transit Key Performance Metrics - May 2025

payload.title: NEW YORK CITY TRANSIT KEY PERFORMANCE METRICS
payload.description: Prepared for the May 2025 meeting of the New York City Transit & Bus Committee

tool_args.raw_text: The Metropolitan Transportation Authority is North America's largest transportation network

tool_args.raw_text: NYPD, who have been taking safety in our system seriously

tool_args.label: NYPD Transit Bureau
tool_args.raw_text: Representatives from ... NYPD Transit Bureau

tool_args.label: Rockaway Resiliency Project
tool_args.raw_text: On Monday, May 19, New York City Transit resumed full service to the Rockaway Peninsula following 17 weeks of capital improvements, just in time for Memorial Day weekend

payload.description: Resiliency and reliability improvements for A and S trains serving Far Rockaway and Rockaway Park. Included complete reconstruction of Hammels Wye, South Channel Bridge overhaul, 12-foot wave barriers, and CBTC-equipping. Delivered on time and on budget.

tool_args.label: Queens Bus Network Redesign Phase 1
tool_args.raw_text: I am looking forward to June when we launch Phase 1 of the Queens Bus Network Redesign. The redesign will be implemented in two phases, aligned with regular seasonal schedule changes: Sunday, June 29, and Sunday, August 31.

payload.description: Transformative initiative launching in Phase 1 on June 29, 2025. 16 new routes will launch, 67 routes will be modified, 5 discontinued in Phase One. In Phase Two, 1 new route, 37 modified, 1 discontinued.

tool_args.label: April 2025 Weekday OTP 84.5%
tool_args.raw_text: In April 2025, weekday On-Time Performance (OTP) was 84.5%

tool_args.label: April 2025 Weekend OTP 86.4%
tool_args.raw_text: Weekend OTP was 86.4%

tool_args.label: April 2025 Subway Service Delivered 96%
tool_args.raw_text: Service Delivered was 95.9%

tool_args.label: April 2025 Paid Weekday Subway Ridership 4.12M
tool_args.raw_text: Paid weekday subway ridership set a new post-pandemic high for a monthly average, at 4.12 million

tool_args.label: April 2025 Paid Weekday Bus Ridership 1.47M
tool_args.raw_text: paid weekday ridership rising 18.2% in April vs April 2024 to 1.47 million

tool_args.label: Subway Fare Evasion Dropped 30% Q2 2024 to Q1 2025
tool_args.raw_text: subway fare evasion has dropped by 30%. From the second quarter of 2024 to the first quarter of 2025

tool_args.label: April 2025 Elevator Availability 97.7%
tool_args.raw_text: In April of this year, our elevators exceeded the standard, and averaged a 97.7% availability across the five boroughs

tool_args.label: April 2025 Average Bus Speed 8.1 mph
tool_args.raw_text: Average bus speed in April was 8.1 mph

tool_args.label: April 2025 Paratransit Record: 1.3M riders, 915K trips
tool_args.raw_text: Paratransit continues to see growing ridership, setting a new record of 1.3 million riders and 915,000 trips during the month of April, both increases of 20% compared to April 2024.

tool_args.label: April 2025 Paratransit Trips 915K
tool_args.raw_text: setting a new record of ... 915,000 trips during the month of April

tool_args.label: April 2025 Major Felony Crime Down 13% MoM
tool_args.raw_text: In April 2025, Major Felony Crime was down 13% month-over-month

tool_args.label: Rockaways Subway Service Restored May 19, 2025
tool_args.raw_text: Rockaways subway service was restored on Monday, May 19. On Monday, May 19, New York City Transit resumed full service to the Rockaway Peninsula following 17 weeks of capital improvements

payload.description: Full A and S train service resumed to Rockaway Peninsula following 17 weeks of Rockaway Resiliency Project capital improvements.

tool_args.label: Queens Bus Network Redesign Phase 1 Launch June 29, 2025
tool_args.raw_text: The redesign will be implemented in two phases, aligned with regular seasonal schedule changes: Sunday, June 29, and Sunday, August 31.

payload.description: Phase 1 of the Queens Bus Network Redesign launches. 16 new routes, 67 modified, 5 discontinued.

tool_args.label: Queens Bus Network Redesign Phase 2 Launch August 31, 2025
tool_args.raw_text: aligned with regular seasonal schedule changes: Sunday, June 29, and Sunday, August 31

payload.description: Phase 2 of the Queens Bus Network Redesign. 1 new route, 37 modified, 1 discontinued.

tool_args.label: Summer 2025 Bus Service Increase on 16 Local Routes
tool_args.raw_text: Over the summer, Transit will increase bus service on 16 local routes across Brooklyn, Queens, the Bronx and Staten Island.

payload.description: Bus service increase on 16 local routes across Brooklyn, Queens, the Bronx and Staten Island, plus enhanced express bus service on 8 lines already in effect.

tool_args.label: Grand Central-42nd St TransitTalk Event
tool_args.raw_text: Earlier this month, NYC Transit President Demetrius Crichlow along with Transit senior management hosted a TransitTalk event at the Grand Central-42nd St (4, 5, 6, 7, S) Station complex.

payload.description: TransitTalk event at Grand Central-42nd St Station complex with Dept of Buses, Customer Services, OMNY, NYPD Transit Bureau, NYC Fair Fares.

tool_args.label: April 2025 Bus CJTP 72.8%
tool_args.raw_text: Customer Journey Time Performance (CJTP) stood at 72.8%

tool_args.label: April 2025 Subway CJTP 85.9%
tool_args.raw_text: The percentage of customers arriving at their destinations within five minutes of schedule remained steady at 85.9%

tool_args.label: April 2025 Paratransit Primary OTP 89%
tool_args.raw_text: Our primary carrier service completed 89% of pickups within the 20-minute window from promise time

tool_args.label: April 2025 Paratransit Broker OTP 95%
tool_args.raw_text: For our broker service, we completed 95% of trips within the 20-minute pickup window

tool_args.label: April 2025 Paratransit Avg Answer Speed 48 Seconds
tool_args.raw_text: the average answer speed was 48 seconds, exceeding our 60 second average answer speed goal

tool_args.label: Rockaway Resiliency Project Delivered On Time and On Budget
tool_args.raw_text: This project, delivered on time and on budget

payload.claim_text: Rockaway Resiliency Project delivered on time and on budget, improving resiliency and reliability of A and S trains for decades to come.
payload.subject: Rockaway Resiliency Project
